mapper.select: SELECT * FROM subscription_plan WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM credit_product WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_subscription (user_id, plan_code, status, started_at, current_period_start, current_period_end) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planCode}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{currentPeriodStart}, #{currentPeriodEnd})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_subscription SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (user_id, provider, product_code, order_id, payment_key, amount, plan, credit_amount, status, paid_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{productCode}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, #{amount}, #{plan}, #{creditAmount}, #{status}, #{paidAt})
mapper.select: SELECT balance_after FROM credit_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_transaction (user_id, ai_usage_log_id, type, amount, balance_after, feature_type, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{aiUsageLogId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{featureType}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT feature_type AS featureType, COUNT(*) AS used, COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) AS creditUsed FROM ai_usage_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{from} GROUP BY feature_type ORDER BY used DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(status = 'PAID'), 0) AS paidCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PAID' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM payment
